mapper.select: select fi.*, dh.number as depotNumber from jsh_freight_item fi left join jsh_depot_head dh on fi.depot_head_id = dh.id where fi.header_id = #{headerId} and fi.delete_flag = '0' order by fi.id asc
select depot_head_id from jsh_freight_item where delete_flag = '0'

select depot_head_id from jsh_freight_item where delete_flag = '0' and depot_head_id in
#{id}
mapper.update: update jsh_freight_item set delete_flag = '1' where header_id = #{headerId}
mapper.select: select ifnull(sum( case when mc.weight_editable = '1' and di.weight is not null then di.weight else di.basic_number * ifnull(m.weight, 0) end ), 0) from jsh_depot_item di left join jsh_material m on di.material_id = m.id left join jsh_material_category mc on m.category_id = mc.id where di.header_id = #{depotHeadId} and ifnull(di.delete_flag, '0') != '1'

select s.supplier as customerName, date_format(dh.oper_time, '%Y-%m-%d') as billTimeStr, (select ifnull(sum(di4.all_price), 0) from jsh_depot_item di4 where di4.header_id = dh.id and ifnull(di4.delete_flag, '0') != '1') as totalAmount, dh.sales_man as salesMan, dh.remark as remark, (select GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT dp2.name SEPARATOR '、') from jsh_depot_item di3 left join jsh_depot dp2 on di3.depot_id = dp2.id where di3.header_id = dh.id and ifnull(di3.delete_flag, '0') != '1') as depotName, (select GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT(m2.name, ' ', di2.oper_number, ifnull(m2.commodity_unit,''), ' ', round(case when mc2.weight_editable = '1' and di2.weight is not null then di2.weight else di2.basic_number * ifnull(m2.weight,0) end, 3), '吨') SEPARATOR '、') from jsh_depot_item di2 left join jsh_material m2 on di2.material_id = m2.id left join jsh_material_category mc2 on m2.category_id = mc2.id where di2.header_id = dh.id and ifnull(di2.delete_flag, '0') != '1') as materialNames from jsh_depot_head dh left join jsh_supplier s on dh.organ_id = s.id and ifnull(s.delete_flag, '0') != '1' where dh.id = #{depotHeadId}

select fi.depot_head_id as depotHeadId, fh.bill_no as freightBillNo from jsh_freight_item fi left join jsh_freight_head fh on fi.header_id = fh.id and fh.delete_flag = '0' where fi.delete_flag = '0' and fi.depot_head_id in
#{id}
